hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional American plumber working under a residential kitchen sink or water heater in a Roswell-area suburban home, clean work uniform, tools visible, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, warm natural daylight.
hero.caption_context: Roswell-local 24/7 plumbing with strong anti-sales-pressure positioning. Hero should read trustworthy + in-home + actually working (not a marketing pose). Prefer owner/tech at a real job site over stock plumber.

gallery.context: Water heater repair or replacement — tank or tankless. Caption 'Water heaters — repair + replace, tankless + tank'.
Drain cleaning or sewer line service — camera scope or auger. Caption 'Drains + sewer — cleaning, camera, full line repair'.
Leak detection + pipe repair — under-slab, wall, or fixture. Caption 'Leak detection + pipe repair — under slab, walls, fixtures'.
Sump pump install or flood cleanup — basement or crawlspace. Caption 'Sump pump + flood cleanup — whole-home water response'.
Gas line install or repair (licensed specialty). Caption 'Gas lines — licensed install + repair'.
Bathroom or kitchen fixture upgrade — toilet, faucet, disposal, full remodel-lite. Caption 'Bath + kitchen upgrades — fixtures, toilets, full-room'.

sections.context: Roswell / Alpharetta / Johns Creek / Sandy Springs suburban residential; Unsplash OK if no real photos

notes: Plumbing vertical — clean + trustworthy is the visual tone, not aggressive-urgent. The 'no hidden fees, no pressure, no surprises' positioning should be reflected visually: real jobs, real hands, no staged-showroom energy. 24/7 emergency is a differentiator — at least one gallery slot (flood/sump or sewer) should read 'we handle the bad day'. Gas line photo reinforces full-qualification signal. Bath+kitchen upgrade signals the business is more than repair-only.
